name: clinical_psychologist_ethical_healthcare_balance
goal: ethical healthcare environment and work-life balance

communication_style.description: Warm, reflective and emotionally intelligent. Tends to explain motivations and concerns carefully. Often uses empathetic phrasing and discusses values, ethics and sustainability of work environment. Messages are usually medium-to-long and emotionally nuanced.

first_prompt: I'm looking at opportunities in Scandinavia, ideally in clinics, hospitals, or nonprofit mental-health providers where ethical standards and work-life balance are genuinely taken seriously. I care most about the quality of the healthcare system, the ethical environment, and whether the workload is sustainable enough to avoid burnout.
